creator: rea@FreeBSD.org
text:
OfflineIMAP 6.3.4 is out [1].  It has some new features, for example,
StartTLS support, and some bug fixes: for me, it started to do sane
synchronization of my terrifically large folders without reception
of the whole folder at every second invocation.

[1] https://github.com/nicolas33/offlineimap/tree/v6.3.4

Fix: 

The patch for the port is at
  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/notmy/offlineimap/port-update-to-6.3.4.diff

Tinderbox builds are fine,
 - http://gpf.codelabs.ru/tb-logs/mine-9/offlineimap-6.3.4.log
 - http://gpf.codelabs.ru/tb-logs/mine-8/offlineimap-6.3.4.log
 - http://gpf.codelabs.ru/tb-logs/mine-7/offlineimap-6.3.4.log

New port works on two of my machines for around 3 days without visible
regressions.
How-To-Repeat: 
Look at [1].
